name: Black Russian Chocolate Chip Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix together all ingredients except the chocolate chips and nuts.
4. Beat vigorously for 2 minutes.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips and nuts, then stir in the remaining ingredients: butter, water, sugar, vodka, and Kahlúa.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow cake to cool completely before removing from the pan.
8. To make glaze, melt butter in a saucepan, stir in water and sugar, and boil for exactly 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
9. Remove from heat, then stir in vodka and Kahlúa.
10. Drizzle glaze evenly over the top and sides of the cooled cake.
